series_metadata.series_description: The Training Files consist of applications for training, seminars and workshops (both internal & external). It list the course requested, the persons name that is requesting the course and it can also be used to confirm the students attendance in a class.

retention_rules.disposition: Paper: Records must be retained for 7 years per IACET, the accrediting CEU (Continuing Education Unit) organization used at OCOSH. Then records can be destroyed. ; Electronic: Records must be retained for 7 years per IACET, the accrediting CEU (Continuing Education Unit) organization used at OCOSH. Then records can be destroyed., Paper: Shred ; Electronic: Delete
